archive_project.title: Archive project
archive_project.description: Archiving a project will unlist your project from your side navigation although you will still be able to access it from your projects page. You can restore the project or delete it whenever you want.

delete_project.title: Delete project
delete_project.description: When deleting a project, all of the data and resources within that project will be permanently removed and cannot be recovered.

toast.error: Project could not be updated. Please try again.

members.label: Members
members.project_lead_description: Select the project lead for the project.
members.default_assignee_description: Select the default assignee for the project.
members.project_subscribers_description: Select members who will receive notifications for this project.

guest_super_permissions.title: Grant view access to all work items for guest users:
guest_super_permissions.sub_heading: This will allow guests to have view access to all the project work items.

invite_members.title: Invite members
invite_members.sub_heading: Invite members to work on your project.

states.heading: States
states.description: Define and customize workflow states to track the progress of your work items.
states.describe_this_state_for_your_members: Describe this state for your members.

empty_state.title: No states available for the {groupKey} group

labels.heading: Labels
labels.description: Create custom labels to categorize and organize your work items
labels.label_max_char: Label name should not exceed 255 characters

estimates.heading: Estimates
estimates.description: Set up estimation systems to track and communicate the effort required for each work item.
estimates.label: Estimates
estimates.title: Enable estimates for my project
estimates.enable_description: They help you in communicating complexity and workload of the team.

success.title: Estimate created
success.message: The estimate has been created successfully

error.title: Estimate creation failed
error.message: We were unable to create the new estimate, please try again.

success.title: Estimate modified
success.message: The estimate has been updated in your project.

error.title: Estimate modification failed
error.message: We were unable to modify the estimate, please try again

error.title: Error!
error.message: Estimate could not be disabled. Please try again

success.title: Estimates re-ordered
success.message: Estimates have been re-ordered in your project.

error.title: Estimate re-order failed
error.message: We were unable to re-order the estimates, please try again

validation.min_length: Estimate needs to be greater than 0.
validation.unable_to_process: We are unable to process your request, please try again.
validation.numeric: Estimate needs to be a numeric value.
validation.character: Estimate needs to be a character value.
validation.unsaved_changes: You have some unsaved changes, Please save them before clicking on done
validation.remove_empty: Estimate can't be empty. Enter a value in each field or remove those you don't have values for.

add_or_update.title: Add, update or remove estimates
add_or_update.description: Manage current system either adding, updating or removing the points or categories.

switch.title: Change estimate type
switch.description: Convert your points system to categories system and vice versa.

automations.label: Automations
automations.heading: Automations
automations.description: Configure automated actions to streamline your project management workflow and reduce manual tasks.

auto-archive.title: Auto-archive closed work items
auto-archive.description: Plane will auto archive work items that have been completed or canceled.
auto-archive.duration: Auto-archive work items that are closed for

auto-close.title: Auto-close work items
auto-close.description: Plane will automatically close work items that haven't been completed or canceled.
auto-close.duration: Auto-close work items that are inactive for

auto-remind.title: Auto-reminders
auto-remind.description: Plane will automatically send reminders via email and in-app notifications to keep your team on track with deadlines.

labels.title: No labels yet
labels.description: Create labels to help organize and filter work items in you project.

estimates.title: No estimate systems yet
estimates.description: Create a set of estimates to communicate the amount of work per work item.

integrations.title: No integrations configured
integrations.description: Configure GitHub and other integrations to sync your project work items.

toggle.title: Enable workflows
toggle.description: Set workflows to control work item movement
toggle.no_states_tooltip: No states are added to the workflow.
toggle.no_work_item_types_tooltip: No work item types are added to the workflow.
toggle.no_states_or_work_item_types_tooltip: No states or work item types are added to the workflow.

error.title: Error!
error.message: Failed to enable workflows. Please try again.

workflows.heading: Workflows
workflows.description: Automate work item transitions and set rules to control how tasks move through your project pipeline.

unmapped_states.title: Unmapped states detected
unmapped_states.description: Some work items for the selected types are currently in states that do not exist in this workflow.
unmapped_states.note: If you enable this workflow, these items will automatically move to the initial state for this workflow.
unmapped_states.label: Missing states
unmapped_states.tooltip: Some work items are in states that are not mapped to this workflow. Open the workflow to review.

empty_state.title: All states are in use
empty_state.description: All defined states for this project are already present in your current workflow.

default_footer.fallback_message: This workflow applies to any work item type that is not assigned to a workflow.

validation.max_length: Name must be less than 255 characters
validation.invalid: Name can only contain letters, numbers, spaces, hyphens, and apostrophes
Description can only contain letters, numbers, spaces, hyphens, and apostrophes

error.title: Error!
error.message: Failed to create workflow. Please try again.

error.title: Error!
error.message: Failed to update workflow. Please try again.

error.title: Error!
error.message: Failed to delete workflow. Please try again.

error.title: Error!
error.message: Failed to add states. Please try again.

work_item_types.heading: Work item Types
work_item_types.description: Create and customize different types of work items with unique properties

cycles.title: Cycles
cycles.description: Schedule work in flexible periods that adapt to this project's unique rhythm and pace.

modules.title: Modules
modules.description: Organize work into sub-projects with dedicated leads and assignees.
modules.toggle_description: Project members will be able to create and edit modules.

views.title: Views
views.description: Save custom sorts, filters, and display options or share them with your team.
views.toggle_description: Project members will be able to create and edit views.

pages.title: Pages
pages.description: Create and edit free-form content; notes, docs, anything.
pages.toggle_description: Project members will be able to create and edit pages.

intake.title: Intake
intake.description: Let non-members share bugs, feedback, and suggestions; without disrupting your workflow.
intake.toggle_description: Let project members create in app intake requests.
intake.toggle_tooltip_on: Ask your Project Admin to turn this on.
intake.toggle_tooltip_off: Ask your Project Admin to turn this off.

notify_assignee.title: Notify assignees
notify_assignee.description: For a new request to intake, default assignees will be alerted via notifications

in_app.title: In-app
in_app.description: Get new work items from Members and Guests in your workspace without disruption to your existing work items.

email.title: Email
email.description: Collect new work items from anyone who sends an email to a Plane email address.

form.title: Forms
form.description: Let folks outside your workspace create potential new work items for you via a dedicated and secure form.
form.create_forms: Create Forms using work item types
form.manage_forms_tooltip: Ask your Workspace Admin to manage this.

error.title: Error!
error.message: Something went wrong while setting assignees. Please try again.

time_tracking.title: Time tracking
time_tracking.description: Log time spent on work items and projects.
time_tracking.toggle_description: Project members will be able to log time worked.

milestones.title: Milestones
milestones.description: Milestones provide a layer to align work items toward shared completion dates.
milestones.toggle_description: Organize work items by milestone deadlines.

toasts.error: Something went wrong while updating project feature. Please try again.

project_updates.heading: Project Updates
project_updates.description: Consolidated tracking and progress monitoring for this project

templates.heading: Templates
templates.description: Save 80% time spent on creating projects, work items, and pages when you use templates.

auto_schedule.heading: Auto-schedule cycles
auto_schedule.description: Keep cycles moving without manual setup.
auto_schedule.tooltip: Automatically create new cycles based on your chosen schedule.

cycle_title.label: Cycle Title
cycle_title.tooltip: The title will be appended with numbers for subsequent cycles. For eg: Design - 1/2/3

validation.min: Cycle duration must be at least 1 week

cooldown_period.label: Cooldown Period
cooldown_period.tooltip: Pause between cycles before the next begins.

validation.past: Start date cannot be in the past

auto_rollover.label: Auto-rollover work items
auto_rollover.tooltip: On the day a cycle completes, move all unfinished work items into the next cycle.

error.title: Error!
error.message_create: Failed to save auto-schedule cycles configuration.
error.message_update: Failed to update auto-schedule cycles configuration.
